case_title: CCSF/TAX COLLECTOR'S OFFICE VS. GORDON RISTIE

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE $92.50. SERVED OCT-26-2023, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT RISTIE, GORDON
